title: ortgiesia coelestis var. albomarginata
intro: Ortgiesia coelestis var. albomarginata, a variety of the Ortgiesia coelestis plant, is a type of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae, commonly known as the mustard family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Ortgiesia coelestis var. albomarginata include reducing inflammation and pain, treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties for various health benefits.
